features: Protecting your hair from escaping when have a shower, this cap could also protect your ears from infection
The elastic band design kept it securely on your head, you are able to keep the hair dry while having a shower
description: Womens Cute Luxury Polka Dot Printed Double Layer Waterproof Shower Cap Bath Cap Often ignored by many women all over the world, shower caps are essential women's accessories that protect hair from water and the chemical elements commonly found in water and most soaps. Our fashion shower caps are comfortable, have well designed waterproof surfaces that keep water out. If you have long hair and want to maintain its luster and health over the years using a shower cap. They are expandable to fit various head shapes and sizes and have feature-rich designs that you will enjoy using on a day-to-day basis.
